title: Villa win Europa League for 1st trophy in 30 years...
summary: Aston Villa won the Europa League final 3-0 against SC Freiburg in Istanbul on Wednesday, securing their first trophy in 30 years. The dominant performance marks a major achievement for the club under manager Unai Emery.
content: Aston Villa cruised to their first trophy in 30 years in a dominant 3-0 win over SC Freiburg in the Europa League final on Wednesday night in Istanbul.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉欧联杯夺冠 30年来首获奖杯
zh.summary: 这一压倒性的表现标志着主教练埃梅里执教下俱乐部的重大成就

title: Sources: Miami closing in on Casemiro signing
summary: Inter Miami is advancing negotiations to sign Brazil midfielder Casemiro for the summer transfer window. The deal is nearing completion according to sources confirmed to ESPN.
content: Inter Miami is working on closing a deal to sign Brazil midfielder Casemiro this summer, sources confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 迈阿密即将完成卡塞米罗转会
zh.summary: 根据ESPN确认的消息，该交易即将完成

title: Villa's Martínez broke finger before UEL final win...
summary: Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez broke his finger during warm-up before the Europa League final against Freiburg but played in the team's 3-0 victory. His performance despite the injury demonstrated remarkable resilience.
content: Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez said he broke his finger while warming up for his team's Europa League final against SC Freiburg in Istanbul on Wednesday.

zh.title: 维拉门神马丁内斯欧联决赛前伤指
zh.summary: 尽管受伤，他的表现展现出非凡的韧性

title: Neymar (calf) to miss Santos games ahead of WC
summary: Neymar suffered a calf injury that will sideline him for Santos' upcoming matches. He is expected to recover in time to join Brazil's World Cup preparation camp next week.
content: Neymar has suffered a calf injury that will sideline him for Santos' upcoming matches, but he is expected to be ready next week to join the Brazil national team camp ahead of the World Cup.

zh.title: 内马尔因小腿伤将缺席世界杯前的桑托斯比赛
zh.summary: 内马尔遭遇小腿伤，将缺席桑托斯队的即将进行的比赛。预计他将在下周恢复后加入巴西世界杯备战营。

title: Source: Lyon taking offers for USMNT's Tessmann
summary: USMNT midfielder Tanner Tessmann could leave Lyon this summer if the right offer arrives. Teams from Germany, Italy, and MLS have expressed interest in the American player.
content: United States midfielder Tanner Tessmann could leave Lyon this summer if the right offer comes for him, a source told ESPN, with teams in Germany, Italy and MLS expressing interest.

zh.title: 消息人士：里昂接收美国队中场特塞曼的报价
zh.summary: 美国队中场坦纳·特塞曼可能在今年夏天如获得合适报价就离开里昂。来自德国、意大利和美国职业大联盟的球队都对这位美国球员表示了兴趣。

title: Saints lose appeal over 'spygate' playoff expulsio...
summary: Southampton's appeal against Championship playoff expulsion has been denied. Middlesbrough will now face Hull City for promotion to the Premier League.
content: Southampton's appeal against being kicked out of the Championship playoffs has been rejected, meaning Middlesbrough will face Hull for a spot in the Premier League.

zh.title: 圣人队"间谍门"季后赛驱逐上诉失败
zh.summary: 南安普敦队对英冠联赛季后赛驱逐的上诉被驳回。米德尔斯堡将与赫尔城争夺升入英超的资格。

title: Copy of Neymar the headliner of Ancelotti's curious Brazil...
summary: Brazil manager Carlo Ancelotti has announced his 2026 World Cup squad with Neymar as a centerpiece. The squad selection marks Neymar's return to the national team for the tournament.
content: Brazil manager Carlo Ancelotti has finally announced his 2026 World Cup squad, with Neymar taking center stage in his return to the team.

zh.title: 内马尔成为安切洛蒂巴西队的头条明星
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂公布了2026年世界杯大名单，内马尔是其中的焦点。这次球队选择标志着内马尔重返国家队参加锦标赛。

title: While Arsenal take glory, Spurs still teeter on th...
summary: Arsenal has claimed the Premier League title while their fierce rivals Tottenham Hotspur remain in relegation danger. Spurs' loss to Chelsea has intensified their precarious league position.
content: As their fierce rivals celebrated a long-awaited league title, Spurs remained in danger of relegation after losing to Chelsea.

zh.title: 阿森纳荣耀时刻，热刺仍在降级边缘
zh.summary: 阿森纳赢得英超冠军，而他们的死敌托特纳姆热刺仍处于降级危险中。热刺对切尔西的失利加剧了他们岌岌可危的联赛位置。

title: How men's relegation impacts a WSL team
summary: When an affiliated men's team faces relegation, it can negatively impact the resources and performance of their Women's Super League counterpart. This demonstrates the interconnected structure of club operations.
content: When an affiliated men's team gets relegated, it can have a bad knock-on effect on their WSL counterparts.

zh.title: 男队降级如何影响女超联赛球队
zh.summary: 当关联的男队面临降级时，会对其女超联赛对应球队的资源和表现产生负面影响。这说明了俱乐部运营的相互关联结构。

title: 'Trust the process': Inside Arsenal's five-phase p...
summary: Arsenal's Premier League title win resulted from a years-long strategic plan consisting of five distinct phases. ESPN has revealed the comprehensive strategy that returned the club to the top of English football.
content: Arsenal's Premier League title triumph has been years in the making. For the first time, ESPN can reveal the strategy which took them back to the top.

zh.title: "相信这个过程":阿森纳五阶段争冠战略
zh.summary: 阿森纳英超冠军源于一项历时数年、包含五个不同阶段的战略计划。ESPN揭露了这一综合战略如何将俱乐部重新推向英超顶峰。
